titleStmt.title: SII 22.20: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 20. (A.R. No. 20 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. PARAK. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—15th YEAR. (A.D. 1028—29)

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tiru manni vaḷara etc. It records an endowment of 140 kāśu by a merchant of Gaṅgaikonḍaśōḻapuram by name Māṇikkavāṇiyaṉ Śandiraṉ••• Kiḍāraṅgoṇḍaśōḻa Māyilaṭṭi, for the purpose of feeding 2 māhēśvaras after the midday offerings to the god. The amount was deposited with the mahāsabhā of Tirukkaḍavūr. Ambar-nāḍu is here mentioned as a division of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila(ṉ)maṭantaiyum porcceyap pāvaiyum cirttaṉi celviyum taṉ perunteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭu taṉatūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉaveliyum paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻ matiḷ koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇarkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavaṉpakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum In=tiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu meṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ Urimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ mu
ṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velaittol peruṅkāval pala paḻan=tivu m ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Aracukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=timat tivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ tiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyiṟ mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanatikulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutiraivaṭa vallai maturaimaṇṭalamum kāmiṭavaḷai nāmaṇaiykkoṇaiyum veñ cilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai
paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇ pū kirtti yātinakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉ ṟolkulattin=tirarataṉai viṉaiyamarkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu pala tanattoṭu niṟaikula taṉakkukaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar cer narkkocalaināṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭa puttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=tan māviḻintoṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaḻal caṅku voṭṭal mayipālaṉai
veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittal neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirtta teṟipuṉaṟ nākiya kaṭārattaracaṉai porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavana(kara) nakar porttoḻiṟ vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉaimaṇip putavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvijaiyamum tuṟaini
rpaṉṉaiyum panmalaiyūreyiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭi liṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācopamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevilim paṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāvalviṉai mātamāliṅkamum kalāmutir kaṭun=tiṟal Ilāmuritecamum tenakkalār poḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭa ṟ kāval kaṭu muraṭkaṭāramum māperun taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa koparakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu Uyyakko
ṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭup paṭa Eviya tirukkaṭavūr mahaāsabhai yom nāḷ 9 10 1- ṉāl Uṭaiyār śrī kālakālatevar śaṇḍeśvararkku Oṭṭi Eḻuttiṭṭu tiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār Ucciyampotai san=ti Amutu ceytaruḷumpotu śrīmāyeśvararkku caṭṭiccoṟu prasātittaruḷa kaṅkai koṇṭacoḻapurattu viracoḻamaṭikai māṇikkavāṇiyaṉ can=tiraṉ ṟkaṉāṉa kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻa māyilaṭṭi caṭṭiccoṟu Iraṇṭukku Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattu vaitta kācu nūṟṟu nāṟpatu Ikkācu nūṟṟunāṟppatuStops here
Digital edition of SII 22.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
